value.value: Can only approve contracts pending approval

Contract is ready or already active
Can only update compliance for active contracts

policies.name: ManagersCanCreateContract
policies.message: Only managers can create vendor contracts

policies.name: AdminsCanApproveContract
policies.message: Only admins can approve vendor contracts

policies.name: AdminsCanTerminateContract
policies.message: Only admins can terminate vendor contracts

policies.name: ProcurementCanUpdateCompliance
policies.message: Managers and admins can update compliance metrics
